title: Virtual interface assign from class task generates no trace dumps and doesn't trigger assign statements

features.name: nonblocking assign to virtual interface signal from class task
features.description: Code should include a class method using non-blocking assignment to assign to a virtual interface signal

features.name: assign statement driven by interface signal
features.description: Code should include a module-level continuous assignment where the right-hand side reads from an interface signal

features.name: always block sensitivity list containing interface signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with sensitivity list that includes an interface signal accessed through an interface instance
